children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the complete place order workflow: validate, charge, reserve, create record, notify.
children.behavior: Calls validate items, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order record, and send notification in sequence, rolling back on failure.

semantic_inputs.name: order_data
semantic_inputs.description: Order payload with items, payment_method, shipping_address

semantic_outputs.name: order_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, order_id, status, message

postconditions: If success: order record created, payment charged, inventory reserved, notification sent
If failure: all changes rolled back

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the complete cancel order workflow: verify, refund, restore inventory, update status.
children.behavior: Calls verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update order status to cancelled, rolling back on failure.

in_scope: verifying order exists and not shipped

semantic_outputs.name: order_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, order_id, status, message

postconditions: If success: order status cancelled, payment refunded, inventory restored

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Return current order status and estimated delivery time.
children.behavior: Queries the orders data store for the given order_id and returns status and estimated delivery time.

semantic_outputs.name: order_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, order_id, status, message, estimated_delivery

postconditions: Order status and estimated delivery returned without side effects

decomposition_rationale: The parent OrderSystem function routes based on command to one of three independent child functions: PlaceOrder, CancelOrder, or TrackOrder. Each child encapsulates the full workflow for its respective command, ensuring atomicity and proper rollback. No child calls another; the parent orchestrates by selecting the appropriate child based on the command input.
